en: One devoted to austerity and study, an ascetic, the best among those skilled in speech
Valmiki questioned Narada, the foremost among sages
Who in this world at present is virtuous, heroic
Knower of dharma, grateful, truthful in speech, firm in vows

sa_verse: चारित्रेण च को युक्तः सर्वभूतेषु को हितः
en: Who is endowed with good character and benevolent to all beings
Who is learned, capable, and pleasing to behold
Who is self-controlled, has conquered anger, is radiant and free from envy
Of whom do even the gods fear when he becomes angry in battle
